---
title: "Past Perfect vs Present Perfect Practice"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Interactive Practice — Past Perfect vs Present Perfect

### ⭐ Remember

<span style="color:blue; font-weight:600;">
Past Perfect → Had + Subject + past participle (past action before another past action) 
</span>

<span style="color:green; font-weight:600;">
Present Perfect → have/has + Subject + past participle (past action with present relevance)
</span>

---

## Part A — Choose the Correct Answer

```{=html}
<div class="quiz-box">
<p>1. ____ the rescue teams ____ the flooded villages yet?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'b')">a) did/reach</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'b')">b) have/reached</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'b')">c) had/reached</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>2. ____ the families ____ the area before the hurricane arrived?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">a) have/left</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">b) leave</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">c) had/left</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>3. ____ you ____ an emergency kit for your home?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">a) have/prepared</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">b) had/prepared</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">c) prepare</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>4. ____ the warning siren ____ before the earthquake started?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">a) has/sounded</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">b) sounds</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">c) had/sounded</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>5. ____ scientists ____ any new volcano activity this year?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">a) have/discovered</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">b) had/discovered</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">c) discover</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>6. ____ the river ____ before the bridge collapsed?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">a) has/risen</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">b) rises</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">c) had/risen</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>7. ____ the villagers ____ their houses after the flood?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">a) have/rebuilt</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">b) had/rebuilt</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">c) rebuild</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>8. ____ the storm ____ the power lines before nightfall?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">a) has/damaged</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">b) damages</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">c) had/damaged</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>9. ____ you ever ____ a strong earthquake?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">a) have/experienced</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">b) had/experienced</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'a')">c) experience</button>
</div>

<div class="quiz-box">
<p>10. ____ the teachers ____ the students to safety before the tsunami hit?</p>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">a) have/moved</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">b) move</button>
<button onclick="checkMCQ(this,'c')">c) had/moved</button>
</div>


```

---

## Part B — Fill in the Blank

Use **present perfect** OR **past perfect**. (Has/have or Had)

```{=html}
<p>1.
<input id="q1">
the city experienced flood this year?
<button onclick="checkText('q1','has')">Check</button>
<span id="r1"></span>
</p>

<p>2.
<input id="q2">
people left their homes by the time the warning sounded?
<button onclick="checkText('q2','had')">Check</button>
<span id="r2"></span>
</p>

<p>3.
<input id="q3">
scientists studied volcano activity for many years?
<button onclick="checkText('q3','have')">Check</button>
<span id="r3"></span>
</p>

<p>4.
<input id="q4">
the river risen before the bridge collapsed?
<button onclick="checkText('q4','had')">Check</button>
<span id="r4"></span>
</p>

<p>5.
<input id="q5">
you prepared emergency kits recently?
<button onclick="checkText('q5','have')">Check</button>
<span id="r5"></span>
</p>
```

```{=html}
<script>
function checkMCQ(btn, correct){
  const text = btn.innerText.trim();
  if(text.startsWith(correct)){
    btn.style.background = "#c8f7c5";
  }else{
    btn.style.background = "#ffd6d6";
  }
}

function checkText(id, answer){
  const input = document.getElementById(id);
  const result = document.getElementById("r" + id.replace("q", ""));
  if(input.value.toLowerCase().trim() === answer){
    result.innerHTML = " ✅";
  }else{
    result.innerHTML = " ❌";
  }
}
</script>

<style>
.quiz-box{
  margin:12px 0;
  padding:12px;
  border:1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius:8px;
}

.quiz-box button{
  margin:4px;
  padding:6px 10px;
  cursor:pointer;
}
</style>
```
